title: Revised Outsourcing Rulebook Module – Cloud Services

classification.summary: This revision to the CBUAE Outsourcing Module introduces mandatory cloud-specific provisions including data residency requirements, right-to-audit clauses, and concentration risk limits for cloud service providers. Licensed institutions relying on public cloud infrastructure must conduct a gap assessment against the updated module and remediate within 6 months.

_selection.reason: policy_area=outsourcing and title contains Cloud Services
